critical.mandate: If scope exceeds quick threshold (more than 5 files or 1 day), offer escalation to full lifecycle

step.title: Scope
step.ask: What small change or feature do you want to spec?

step.title: Escape Hatch Check
step.check: This looks bigger than a quick spec. Would you like to escalate to the full lifecycle? (create-prd → create-architecture → create-epics-stories)
step.action: If user declines: continue with quick spec

step.title: Generate Quick Spec
step.action: Include: what to change, files affected, acceptance criteria, risks

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate quick spec with: summary, files to change, implementation steps, acceptance criteria, risks.
